description: ImageTransformAssetComponent — Pillow-based image resize / crop / format-convert.

image_path_column.label: Image Path Column
image_path_column.description: Column containing local image file paths.

output_dir.label: Output Dir
output_dir.description: Filesystem dir to write transformed images into.

output_filename_template.label: Output Filename Template
output_filename_template.description: Filename template (no dir). Supports `{<column>}` and `{row_index}`. Default: <input_basename>_t.<ext>.

output_path_column.label: Output Path Column
output_path_column.description: New column to write the transformed file path into.

resize_to.label: Resize To
resize_to.description: `[width, height]` max-dimensions. Aspect ratio preserved by default.

crop_to.label: Crop To
crop_to.description: `[width, height]` center-crop dimensions. Applied AFTER resize if both set.

convert_to.label: Convert To
convert_to.description: Output format. Determines file extension AND encoding.

quality.label: Quality
quality.description: JPEG/WebP quality 1-100. Ignored for lossless formats.

name: Image Transform Asset
